description: User types 'partic' into the search input field on the Studies page.
frame_description: The search input field changes from empty to containing the text 'partic'.

description: User finishes typing 'participant app' into the search input, filtering the studies list to a single matching result.
frame_description: The search text is completed, and the list of studies below updates to show only the 'BCA - Participant App Screen Reader Test' study.
